sentences.quote: We give the SK-EFT-predicted analog Hawking spectrum, surface gravity kappa, dispersive parameter D, and stimulated-Hawking gain at the Paris-LKB exciton-polariton platform's published device parameters~\cite{Falque2025}.

sentences.quote: $T_H \approx \SI{85}{\milli\kelvin}$ at the smooth-horizon configuration ($\kappa = \SI{7e10}{\per\second}$, $D \approx 0.60$)

sentences.quote: The leading dispersive correction $\delta_{\rm disp} = -\pi D^2/6$ spans $\sim$0.19--0.46 across the measured range

sentences.quote: The stimulated-Hawking gain $G(\omega) = \Gamma(\omega) / (e^{2\pi \omega/\kappa_{\rm eff}} - 1)$ crosses the single-shot $5\sigma$ threshold $G > 0.5$ at $\omega < \ln(3)/(2\pi)\,\kappa \approx 0.175\,\kappa$ (universal, $\kappa$-independent)
sentences.quote_normalized: g(omega) crosses the single-shot 5sigma threshold g > 0.5 at omega < ln(3)/(2pi) kappa approx 0.175 kappa universal kappa-independent
sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 fix verified. Paper now reads 'single-shot 5sigma threshold G > 0.5 at omega < ln(3)/(2pi) kappa approx 0.175 kappa'. Recomputation: 1/(exp(2*pi*ln(3)/(2*pi))-1) = 1/(exp(ln(3))-1) = 1/(3-1) = 0.5 EXACTLY. Matches canonical provenance.py:3580: 'Stimulated gain G(omega) > 0.5 for omega < ln(3)/(2*pi)*kappa ≈ 0.175 kappa'. ln(3)/(2*pi) = 0.174850 ≈ 0.175 (rounded). FAIL → PASS.

sentences.quote: $\mathrm{SNR} \approx 11$ for $N_{\rm probe} \sim 100$ probe photons per mode --- a $10^3$--$10^6$ improvement over spontaneous-correlation detection
sentences.quote_normalized: snr approx 11 for n_probe ~ 100 probe photons per mode -- a 10^3--10^6 improvement over spontaneous-correlation detection

Cross-check with new threshold: at G=0.5, single-shot 5sigma needs N_probe = (5/G)^2 = 100 — exactly matches the 'N_probe ~ 100' claim. Self-consistent.

non_reproducing_prior_findings.prior_summary: Stimulated-gain threshold value drift: paper repeats 'G > 0.01 at omega < 0.175 kappa' in 3 places; canonical project value (provenance.py:3580) is G > 0.5 at omega < 0.175 kappa.
non_reproducing_prior_findings.evidence: Round-2 fix verified at all 3 sites: abstract (line 37 'G > 0.5'), body §4 (line 157 'G > 0.5 (i.e., N_probe G^2 >= 25 for N_probe = 100)'), figure 1 caption (line 172 'G = 0.5 (equivalently N_probe = 25/G^2 = 100 probe photons per mode)'). Visualization PNG regenerated at 07:03 with dashed line at y=0.5 and annotation 'G = 0.5 (5σ with 100 probe photons / mode)'. Recompute G(0.175κ) = 1/(exp(2π·0.175)-1) = 1/2 = 0.5 EXACTLY, matching canonical provenance.py:3580. Drift fully resolved. PDF recompiled (3 pages, 373291 bytes).

non_reproducing_prior_findings.prior_summary: Figure 1 caption photon-count claim: 'G=0.01 below which ~10^4 probe photons per mode are needed for 5sigma'. At G=0.01, N_probe = (5/0.01)^2 = 250,000 not 10^4.
non_reproducing_prior_findings.evidence: Round-2 fix: caption now reads 'N_probe = 25/G^2 = 100 probe photons per mode' at G=0.5. Recompute: 25/(0.5)^2 = 100. Self-consistent with abstract's 'SNR ≈ 11 for N_probe ~ 100' (SNR = sqrt(100)·G(0.1k) = 10·1.144 = 11.44 ≈ 11).

summary.agent_text: Round 2 verdict GREEN. 26 representative sentences re-walked (Tier-4 lightweight). Round-1 propagating drift block:E1:1 (G>0.01 vs canonical G>0.5) and block:E1:2 (10^4 photon-count) both fully resolved across all 3 sites: abstract line 37, body §4 line 157 (with explicit derivation N_probe·G²≥25), figure 1 caption line 172. Visualization regenerated (dashed line at y=0.5, annotation updated). PDF recompiled (3 pages, 373KB). Internal consistency verified: at ω/κ=ln(3)/(2π)≈0.175, G=0.5 exactly; N_probe=25/G²=100 exactly; SNR=√100·G(0.1κ)=10·1.144=11.44 (paper rounds to 11). All round-1 PASS findings (Lean theorem refs, citation registry, parameter provenance, Lean toolchain pin, counts.json freshness) revalidated and still hold. Stage-9 carry-forward GREEN preserved. 1 WARN (cosmetic boxed-window \label) carries forward as non-blocking advisory. Zero FAIL. stage10_status → GREEN.
